message:
fix(runtime): complete resize coalescer migration in program.rs

Follow-up to the ResizeCoalescer refactor:

- Update AppBuilder::resize_debounce() to write to
  resize_coalescer.steady_delay_ms instead of the removed
  resize_debounce field, preserving backwards-compatible API

- Update default config assertions in tests to match the new
  Throttled behavior (was Placeholder) and check coalescer config
  instead of raw debounce duration

- Remove two ResizeDebouncer unit tests that tested the old
  debounce timer (now replaced by resize_coalescer.rs tests)

- Add record_external_apply() to ResizeCoalescer for immediate
  resize mode, allowing the coalescer to track externally applied
  resizes so it can clear matching pending events

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
